document_summary: This exhibit contains Dehuan Liu's academic profile from Peking University's Academic Committee page, his Ph.D. graduation certificate from Peking University (Sociology, 1999-2002), and QS World University Rankings pages showing Peking University ranked #17 globally in the 2024 QS World University Rankings. The document establishes Liu's credentials as a Professor and Vice Dean at Peking University, one of the world's top-ranked universities.

snippets.text: LIU Dehuan, male, born in 1966 of Han nationality holds a Ph.D. in Sociology from Peking University. He serves as a Professor at School of New Media at Peking University, the Vice Dean of School of Journalism and Communication at Peking University, the President of National Market Research Association (President of Research Branch of China Information Association & President of Market Research Branch of China Association of Market Information and Research), the Vice President of China Association of Market Information and Research, and the Deputy Director of Center for Market and Media Research at Peking University. Liu was selected as a scholar of Beijing's "Hundred People Project", and his work "On Age" won the third prize of Outstanding Achievements in Humanities and Social Sciences of the Ministry of Education of China. His research areas are communication, new media and market research.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Comprehensive academic profile of Liu Dehuan showing his PhD, professorship, leadership roles, and awards including the MOE third prize. Directly establishes his credentials.

snippets.text: Graduate student Liu Dehuan, male, born on March 29, 1966, studied in the Sociology Department's sociology major from September 1999 to July 2002, for a period of three years. He has completed all the courses of the Ph.D. program, passed with satisfactory grades, and successfully defended his graduation thesis, thus qualifying for graduation.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Official PhD graduation certificate text confirming Liu earned his PhD from Peking University in Sociology.

snippets.subject: Peking University
snippets.reasoning: Title of the graduation certificate document from Peking University, directly proving Liu's PhD credential.

snippets.text: Peking University is one of the top public universities in Beijing, China (Mainland). It is ranked #17 in QS World University Rankings 2024.
snippets.subject: Peking University
snippets.reasoning: QS World University Rankings placing Peking University at #17 globally, establishing the prestige and credibility of Liu's alma mater and employer.

snippets.text: The oldest higher education institution in China, Peking University was founded in 1898 as a replacement for the ancient Guozijian school (Imperial College). By the early 1920s, it had become a center for Chinese progressive thought, playing an important role in China's New Culture Movement, the May Fourth Movement, and the Tiananmen Square protest of 1989, among other significant historical events.
snippets.subject: Peking University
snippets.reasoning: Background on Peking University as China's oldest and most historically significant higher education institution.

snippets.text: At present, Peking university has 216 research institutes and research centres, and there are 2 national engineering research centres, 81 key national disciplines, 12 national key laboratories.
snippets.subject: Peking University
snippets.reasoning: Quantitative details about Peking University's research infrastructure, supporting its status as a leading research university.
